install: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git
upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --only-upgrade git

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id Git.Git --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id Git.Git --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'Git.Git' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

install: curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo 'deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gh
upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --only-upgrade gh

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id GitHub.cli --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id GitHub.cli --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'GitHub.cli' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

install: curl -fsSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --dearmor > /tmp/microsoft.gpg && sudo install -o root -g root -m 644 /tmp/microsoft.gpg /usr/share/keyrings/microsoft-archive-keyring.gpg && echo 'deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/microsoft-archive-keyring.gpg] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/code stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/vscode.list > /dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y code
upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --only-upgrade code

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command code -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id Microsoft.VisualStudioCode --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command code -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id Microsoft.VisualStudioCode --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'Microsoft.VisualStudioCode' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

install: curl -fsSL 'https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip' -o /tmp/awscliv2.zip && cd /tmp && unzip -qo awscliv2.zip && sudo ./aws/install && rm -rf /tmp/aws /tmp/awscliv2.zip
upgrade: curl -fsSL 'https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip' -o /tmp/awscliv2.zip && cd /tmp && unzip -qo awscliv2.zip && sudo ./aws/install --update && rm -rf /tmp/aws /tmp/awscliv2.zip

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command aws -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id Amazon.AWSCLI --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1

install: brew tap hashicorp/tap && brew install hashicorp/tap/terraform
upgrade: brew tap hashicorp/tap && brew upgrade hashicorp/tap/terraform

version_cmd: terraform version -json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)['terraform_version'])" 2>/dev/null || terraform version | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's/^v//'
install: curl -fsSL https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list > /dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y terraform
upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --only-upgrade terraform

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command terraform -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id Hashicorp.Terraform --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command terraform -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id Hashicorp.Terraform --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'Hashicorp.Terraform' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

install: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y maven
upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --only-upgrade maven

detect_cmd: $mvn = Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($mvn) { exit 0 }; $managed = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'GHDP\tools\apache-maven\bin\mvn.cmd'; if (Test-Path $managed) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $mvn = Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($mvn) { & $mvn.Source --version | Select-Object -First 1; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $managed = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'GHDP\tools\apache-maven\bin\mvn.cmd'; if (Test-Path $managed) { & $managed --version | Select-Object -First 1; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; exit 1
install: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (-not (Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { throw 'Apache Maven requires Java on PATH. Install a JDK first.' }; $version='3.9.14'; $toolsRoot=Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'GHDP\tools'; $target=Join-Path $toolsRoot 'apache-maven'; $archive=Join-Path $env:TEMP ('apache-maven-' + $version + '-bin.zip'); $expanded=Join-Path $toolsRoot ('apache-maven-' + $version); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $toolsRoot | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/' + $version + '/binaries/apache-maven-' + $version + '-bin.zip') -OutFile $archive; if (Test-Path $target) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $target -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path $expanded) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $expanded -Recurse -Force }; Expand-Archive -LiteralPath $archive -DestinationPath $toolsRoot -Force; Rename-Item -LiteralPath $expanded -NewName 'apache-maven' -Force; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $archive -Force; $bin=Join-Path $target 'bin'; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('MAVEN_HOME',$target,'User'); $userPath=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('Path','User'); $segments=@(); if ($userPath) { $segments = $userPath -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ } }; $segments = $segments | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'apache-maven(\\|$)' }; if ($segments -notcontains $bin) { $segments += $bin }; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('Path',($segments -join ';'),'User'); $env:MAVEN_HOME=$target; if (($env:Path -split ';') -notcontains $bin) { $env:Path = $bin + ';' + $env:Path }; & (Join-Path $bin 'mvn.cmd') --version
upgrade: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (-not (Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { throw 'Apache Maven requires Java on PATH. Install a JDK first.' }; $version='3.9.14'; $toolsRoot=Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'GHDP\tools'; $target=Join-Path $toolsRoot 'apache-maven'; $archive=Join-Path $env:TEMP ('apache-maven-' + $version + '-bin.zip'); $expanded=Join-Path $toolsRoot ('apache-maven-' + $version); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $toolsRoot | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/' + $version + '/binaries/apache-maven-' + $version + '-bin.zip') -OutFile $archive; if (Test-Path $target) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $target -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path $expanded) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $expanded -Recurse -Force }; Expand-Archive -LiteralPath $archive -DestinationPath $toolsRoot -Force; Rename-Item -LiteralPath $expanded -NewName 'apache-maven' -Force; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $archive -Force; $bin=Join-Path $target 'bin'; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('MAVEN_HOME',$target,'User'); $userPath=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('Path','User'); $segments=@(); if ($userPath) { $segments = $userPath -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ } }; $segments = $segments | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'apache-maven(\\|$)' }; if ($segments -notcontains $bin) { $segments += $bin }; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('Path',($segments -join ';'),'User'); $env:MAVEN_HOME=$target; if (($env:Path -split ';') -notcontains $bin) { $env:Path = $bin + ';' + $env:Path }; & (Join-Path $bin 'mvn.cmd') --version

uninstall: sudo apt-get remove -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id Docker.DockerDesktop --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id Docker.DockerDesktop --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'Docker.DockerDesktop' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

upgrade: uv self update || brew upgrade uv
uninstall: uv self uninstall || brew uninstall uv

upgrade: uv self update || curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

install: Write-Host 'uv is not supported on Windows in GHDP (use Python+pip/venv).'; exit 1
upgrade: Write-Host 'uv is not supported on Windows in GHDP.'; exit 1
uninstall: Write-Host 'uv is not supported on Windows in GHDP.'; exit 1
detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command uv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command uv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { & $cmd.Source --version | Select-Object -First 1; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; exit 1

install: echo 'RStudio Desktop must be installed manually on Linux. Download from https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/' && exit 1
upgrade: echo 'RStudio Desktop must be upgraded manually on Linux.' && exit 1
uninstall: sudo apt-get remove -y rstudio 2>/dev/null || echo 'RStudio not found'

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command rstudio -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id Posit.RStudio --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command rstudio -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id Posit.RStudio --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'Posit.RStudio' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

install: brew tap atlassian/homebrew-acli && brew install acli
upgrade: brew upgrade acli || (brew tap atlassian/homebrew-acli && brew upgrade acli)

install: echo 'Atlassian CLI must be installed manually on Linux. See https://bobswift.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ACLI' && exit 1
upgrade: echo 'Atlassian CLI must be upgraded manually on Linux.' && exit 1
uninstall: echo 'Atlassian CLI must be removed manually on Linux.' && exit 1

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command acli -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id Atlassian.AtlassianCLI --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command acli -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id Atlassian.AtlassianCLI --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'Atlassian.AtlassianCLI' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

install: npm install -g @openai/codex 2>/dev/null || echo 'Install Codex CLI via npm: npm install -g @openai/codex' && exit 1

detect_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command codex -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { exit 0 }; $wg = winget list -e --id OpenAI.Codex --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $wg) { exit 0 }; exit 1
version_cmd: $cmd = Get-Command codex -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { try { $out = & $cmd.Source --version 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $out | Select-Object -First 1; exit 0 } } catch { } }; $row = winget list -e --id OpenAI.Codex --accept-source-agreements --disable-interactivity 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern 'OpenAI.Codex' | Select-Object -First 1; if ($row) { ($row.ToString() -split '\s+')[-2]; exit 0 }; exit 1

detect_cmd: from pathlib import Path; import shutil, sys; home = Path.home(); candidates = [shutil.which('claude') or '', str(home / '.local' / 'bin' / ('claude.exe' if sys.platform.startswith('win') else 'claude')), str(home / '.claude' / 'local' / ('claude.exe' if sys.platform.startswith('win') else 'claude'))]; found = next((p for p in candidates if p and Path(p).exists()), ''); raise SystemExit(0 if found else 1)
version_cmd: from pathlib import Path; import subprocess, shutil, sys; home = Path.home(); candidates = [shutil.which('claude') or '', str(home / '.local' / 'bin' / ('claude.exe' if sys.platform.startswith('win') else 'claude')), str(home / '.claude' / 'local' / ('claude.exe' if sys.platform.startswith('win') else 'claude'))]; found = next((p for p in candidates if p and Path(p).exists()), ''); import sys as _sys; _sys.exit(1) if not found else None; proc = subprocess.run([found, '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True); out = (proc.stdout or proc.stderr or '').strip(); print(out.splitlines()[0] if out else '')

uninstall: claude uninstall -y 2>/dev/null || true; npm uninstall -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/claude"; rm -rf "$HOME/.claude/local"; exit 0
claude uninstall -y 2>/dev/null || true; npm uninstall -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/claude"; rm -rf "$HOME/.claude/local"; exit 0

$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; if (Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { claude uninstall -y | Out-Null }; if (Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { npm uninstall -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code | Out-Null }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$HOME\.claude\local" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force "$HOME\.local\bin\claude.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; exit 0
